Description: Inventory record for any secret, certificate or key tracked by the Credential Lifecycle Manager.
Audit log entry for each execution of a discovery flow.
Time-series history of actions taken against a credential (discovered, reminded, claimed, renewed, etc.).
Fallback rule that maps a credential to a team when no explicit owner is set on the source object.
Logical scope (Power Platform environment, Azure subscription, tenant) that discovery flows are configured to scan.
Scope the discovery identity cannot enumerate (no list perm, no read perm, network blocked, etc.). Surfaces 'unknown unknowns'.
